headline: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: Record Club aims to be the Letterboxd for music lovers. It offers a clean interface for cataloging listening habits. Connect with other music fans and discover new sounds.

headline: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn, music tech legend, created iconic drum machines like the MPC and LinnDrum. He's been at the forefront of music technology for decades. Linn maintains extreme focus by limiting himself to a single browser tab.

headline: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Discover 38 recommended Memorial Day tech deals for $50 or less. Find great discounts on gadgets like portable chargers and streaming devices. Don't break the bank for essential tech upgrades.

headline: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
summary: Experience the comfort of a virtual coffee shop set in Tokyo. This review explores finding solace in digital environments. It mirrors the personal joy of discovering a perfect real-world cafe.

headline: Ranking the Star Wars Movies From Worst to Best
summary: A comprehensive ranking of all live-action Star Wars movies. The list includes the much-anticipated 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' film. See where your favorite Star Wars installment lands.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Confirmed to Feature Drunk Load Screen After Ubisoft Post Confuses Fans
summary: Ubisoft confirms Edward Kenway's drunk load screen returns in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced. Fans were initially confused by a prior Ubisoft post. The iconic feature will be preserved in the upcoming title.

headline: The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
summary: Antony Starr, who plays Homelander in 'The Boys,' bids farewell to his iconic role. He shared spoiler-heavy behind-the-scenes photos on Instagram. The post marks the conclusion of his time as the complex character.

headline: The Best Deals Today: M5 MacBook Air, AirPods Pro 3, Monster Hunter Stories 3, and More
summary: Discover today's top deals on popular tech and games. Grab discounts on the M5 MacBook Air and AirPods Pro 3. Find savings on titles like Monster Hunter Stories 3.

headline: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'
summary: A 16-year-old girl describes her anguish after her rapists were spared jail. She told the BBC the judge's decision felt like "a rock in my face." The victim questioned the justice system's outcome.

headline: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
summary: A suspect was killed after opening fire on Secret Service near the White House. The incident occurred at a checkpoint, injuring a bystander. Authorities are investigating the shooting.

headline: Heatwave likely to be confirmed as record-breaking temperatures forecast
summary: A heatwave is highly probable as record-breaking temperatures are forecast. New national May temperature records could be set on bank holiday Monday. Brace for soaring temperatures across the region.

headline: Four dead and dozens injured in wave of Russian strikes on Kyiv
summary: Four people have died in a wave of Russian strikes on Kyiv. Over 50 individuals, including three children, sustained injuries. Significant damage is reported across the capital and nearby regions.
